tools.name: execute-task
tools.title: Execute OpenCode Task
tools.description: Execute a one-shot opencode build task. Runs opencode CLI with the prompt provided by webAssist (which includes WAC.json data inline). Returns success or failure only — knowledge units are written to disk by opencode.

prompt.description: Full prompt from webAssist, including WAC.json data inline. Used as-is for opencode build.

projectDir.description: Directory where opencode will build the AKU. All knowledge units are stored under .aku/ within this directory.
